images.hook: A mythologized threat actor portrait that makes cybersecurity professionals stop scrolling because it frames DragonForce as a corporation, not a gang.
images.caption:
They didn't build a ransomware group. They built a cartel with a brand, a revenue model, and a franchise.

December 6, 2023 — BreachForums. A new name surfaces.
March 19, 2025 — The cartel is formally announced.
April 8, 2025 — RansomHub absorbed. The empire expands.

363 confirmed victims. 30+ countries. Affiliates keep 80%.

This isn't crime. This is a SaaS business with dragons.

#DragonForce #Ransomware #RaaS #CyberThreatIntelligence #Cybersecurity
images.prompt: CINEMATIC VERTICAL PORTRAIT, 4:5 aspect ratio, ultra-high detail, photorealistic digital painting hybrid. TOP STRIP: A burned-in banner at the very top of the image — matte black background with gold circuit-trace border, bold white sans-serif all-caps text reading 'CASE STUDY: DRAGONFORCE RANSOMWARE CARTEL', and directly beneath it in smaller crimson condensed font: 'Image 01 — Identity & Brand — The Circuit Dragon'. MAIN VISUAL: A massive stylized dragon constructed entirely from glowing circuit board traces and fiber-optic strands fills the frame center, coiled in a throne-like posture. Its body is built from dark PCB green panels with gold solder traces glowing amber and electric blue. Its scales are individual server rack panels stamped with the text 'RaaS AFFILIATE PORTAL', 'REV SPLIT 80/20', and 'ENCRYPTED: ChaCha8'. The dragon's eyes are twin glowing CRT monitors displaying the text 'DRAGONFORCE' in pixelated white-on-black. Its talons grip a fractured globe showing crack lines over the US (labeled '52% VICTIMS'), UK (labeled '12%'), and Australia (labeled '6%'). Behind the dragon, a massive stone throne wall is etched with MITRE ATT&CK codes burned like hieroglyphics: 'T1486 — DATA ENCRYPTED FOR IMPACT', 'T1059 — COMMAND SCRIPTING', 'T1562.001 — IMPAIR DEFENSES: DISABLE OR MODIFY TOOLS' — each glowing faint red. The floor is a reflective obsidian surface showing the dragon's reflection distorted into corporate org-chart lines. In the bottom-left corner, a timestamp burned into stone: 'DEBUT: 06 DEC 2023 — BREACHFORUMS'. In the bottom-right corner: 'CARTEL DECLARED: 19 MAR 2025'. BURNED-IN TEXT ELEMENTS: On the dragon's chest scales, a metal plate embossed with 'DRAGONFORCE RaaS v2.0 — PLATFORM CARTEL MODEL — RANSOMHUB ABSORBED: 08 APR 2025'. Floating holographic text panels orbiting the dragon head read: '363 CONFIRMED VICTIMS', '212.5% ATTACK SURGE', 'PEAK: 35 ORGS — DEC 2025'. BOTTOM STRIP: Across the very bottom, a black bar with gold circuit border contains two lines of white text — large bold: 'THEY DIDN'T BUILD A GANG. THEY BUILT A FRANCHISE.' — smaller below: 'DragonForce RaaS | 363 Victims | 30+ Countries | Est. Dec 2023'. COLOR PALETTE: Deep obsidian black #0A0A0F, PCB forest green #1A3A2A, molten gold circuit amber #FFB300, electric cobalt blue #0057FF, emergency crimson #CC0000, cool silver chrome #C0C0C0. LIGHTING: Single dramatic upward theatrical spotlight from below in molten gold, casting long upward shadows on the dragon's face and circuit scales, rim-lit on all edges by electric blue volumetric haze, deep vignette on all four corners pushing darkness inward. STYLE: Hyper-detailed dark fantasy digital painting meets technical schematic art, cinematic vertical composition, GPU-rendered reflections on obsidian floor, ultra-fine circuit trace detail, no photographic humans, mythological corporate branding aesthetic.

images.topic: The Binary Signature — Ransom Note Decoded
images.hook: The ransomware note reconstructed as a crime scene artifact makes viewers lean in to read every detail — triggering engagement through visceral authenticity.
images.caption:
When DragonForce hits, the first thing you see is a note.

The last thing you see is your data.

ChaCha8 encryption. Cross-platform. Windows. Linux. ESXi.
BYOVD — truesight.sys + rentdrv2.sys — your EDR is already dead before the note appears.

Marks & Spencer. Co-op. Harrods. Summer 2025. £300M+ impact.

The note is not a warning. It's a receipt.

#DragonForce #RansomwareAttack #BYOVD #EDRKilling #ThreatIntelligence
images.prompt: CINEMATIC VERTICAL CRIME SCENE DOCUMENTARY STILL, 4:5 aspect ratio, photorealistic forensic photography aesthetic. TOP STRIP: Burned into the top edge — a thick matte black bar with fine crimson border lines, bold white condensed all-caps: 'CASE STUDY: DRAGONFORCE RANSOMWARE CARTEL', immediately below in smaller electric blue monospace font: 'Image 02 — The Binary Signature — Ransom Note Decoded'. MAIN VISUAL: A wide forensic examination table fills the lower two-thirds of the frame, lit from directly above by a single harsh forensic spotlight casting hard shadows. On the table surface: a printed ransom note document, heavily aged and creased, pinned down at corners with evidence markers numbered #1 through #4. The ransom note text is fully readable and burned into the scene — typed in Courier monospace on yellowed paper: 'YOUR NETWORK HAS BEEN ENCRYPTED BY DRAGONFORCE | ALL FILES LOCKED WITH ChaCha8 ALGORITHM | WINDOWS • LINUX • ESXi — ALL PLATFORMS COMPROMISED | YOUR EDR WAS TERMINATED BEFORE THIS EXECUTED | truesight.sys — BYOVD DEPLOYED | rentdrv2.sys — DRIVER EXPLOITED | TO RECOVER YOUR FILES VISIT: [DRAGONFORCE ONION PORTAL] | PAYMENT DEADLINE: 72 HOURS | NON-PAYMENT = PUBLIC DATA AUCTION'. Beside the ransom note, a smartphone with a cracked screen displays a hex dump — lines of binary and hex code glowing: '43 68 61 43 68 61 38 2E 45 4E 43 52 59 50 54 45 44' with the label 'ChaCha8 ENCRYPTION HEADER SIGNATURE' burned in red below the screen. A second evidence item is a USB drive with a printed label taped on reading 'rentdrv2.sys — VULNERABLE DRIVER — CVE EXPLOIT — BYOVD CARRIER'. A third item is a manila folder stamped 'VICTIMS — CONFIRMED 363' with visible document excerpts showing company names: 'MARKS & SPENCER — JUNE 2025 — EST. LOSS £100M+', 'CO-OP GROUP — MAY 2025', 'HARRODS — JUNE 2025', 'TOTAL SECTOR IMPACT: £300M+'. A forensic ruler runs along the bottom of the table. In the upper right corner of the image, a wall-mounted corkboard is visible in the background with printed MITRE ATT&CK technique cards pinned to it — 'T1486', 'T1068 — EXPLOITATION FOR PRIVILEGE ESCALATION', 'T1562.001 — EDR KILL' — connected by red string. A digital timestamp watermarked in the bottom-left corner of the photograph: '2025-12-01 | 03:47:22 UTC | CASE FILE: DF-2025-363'. BURNED-IN TEXT ON TABLE SURFACE: Stenciled directly onto the examination table metal: 'OPERATION CIRCUIT DRAGON — ACTIVE SINCE DEC 6 2023 — 212.5% YOY SURGE'. BOTTOM STRIP: Full-width black bar at the very bottom — large bold white text: 'YOUR EDR WAS ALREADY DEAD. THE NOTE WAS JUST PAPERWORK.' — smaller below in crimson: 'BYOVD: truesight.sys + rentdrv2.sys | ChaCha8 | 363 Victims | Summer 2025: £300M+ Impact'. COLOR PALETTE: Forensic cold white #F5F5F0, aged paper ivory #E8DFC8, evidence marker yellow #FFD700, blood crimson #8B0000, electric blue hex-dump #00AAFF, deep shadow charcoal #1A1A1A, steel table grey #4A4A4A. LIGHTING: Single overhead forensic examination spotlight at 90 degrees directly above the table, creating hard circular light pool on the documents with extreme contrast shadow edges, ambient cool blue-grey fill from sides, deep darkness in background, slight film-grain texture overlay. STYLE: Hyper-realistic forensic crime scene documentary photography, extreme close-detail on paper textures and printed fonts, all text legible and embedded as physical printed artifacts, no digital overlays — everything is a physical object in the scene, aspect ratio 4:5 vertical.

images.hook: The geographic mystery of DragonForce's origin — visualized as a shadowed map room — triggers engagement because attribution ambiguity is the scariest truth in threat intelligence.
images.caption:
Where is DragonForce from?

Malaysia? The initial hacktivist phase points east.
Russia? The RaaS model, the timing, the affiliate structure.
Somewhere else entirely? The cartel doesn't say.

What we know:
📍 BreachForums debut — December 6, 2023
📍 Cartel model declared — March 19, 2025
📍 RansomHub absorbed — April 8, 2025
📍 363 victims. 30+ countries. No confirmed origin.

In ransomware, the most dangerous actor is the one with no fixed address.

#DragonForce #ThreatActorAttribution #RansomwareCartel #CyberEspionage #InfoSec
images.prompt: CINEMATIC VERTICAL GEOPOLITICAL WAR ROOM SCENE, 4:5 aspect ratio, ultra-detailed photorealistic digital painting. TOP STRIP: At the very top of the image, a burned-in design element — thick dark slate bar with faint dragon-scale texture, bold white sans-serif all-caps: 'CASE STUDY: DRAGONFORCE RANSOMWARE CARTEL', below it in smaller amber monospace: 'Image 03 — The Origin Nobody Can Confirm'. MAIN VISUAL: A dramatic underground war room bunker environment. The dominant centerpiece is a massive floor-to-ceiling vintage cartographic world map mounted on cracked concrete, illuminated by a single overhead swinging Edison bulb casting warm amber light. The map is physically aged — torn edges, water-stained — but overlaid with PHYSICAL PINNED ELEMENTS: Red pins stuck into the United States labeled with a paper tag reading '52% — 189 VICTIMS', a pin in the United Kingdom labeled '12% — 44 VICTIMS', a pin in Australia labeled '6% — 22 VICTIMS'. Red string connects all pins to a central QUESTION MARK pin located in Southeast Asia — near Malaysia — with a paper tag reading 'ORIGIN: UNCONFIRMED'. A second string leads to Eastern Europe, tagged 'HYPOTHESIS: RU-LINKED RaaS MODEL'. A third string leads to nowhere — dangling off the edge of the map into darkness. On the concrete wall beside the map, chalk writing and taped documents form a timeline: a chalkboard reads in handwritten white chalk — 'DEC 6 2023 — BREACHFORUMS DEBUT', 'MAR 19 2025 — CARTEL DECLARED', 'APR 8 2025 — RANSOMHUB ABSORBED', '2025 — 35 ORGS HIT IN ONE MONTH'. Beneath the timeline in large chalk letters: 'ATTRIBUTION STATUS: UNKNOWN'. A wooden desk in the foreground holds an open case file folder stamped 'CLASSIFIED — DRAGONFORCE THREAT ACTOR PROFILE — TLP:RED' with visible pages showing: a printout labeled 'SCATTERED SPIDER COLLABORATION — VISHING CAMPAIGN CONFIRMED', another page reading 'AFFILIATE COUNT: UNKNOWN | REVENUE MODEL: 80/20 SPLIT'. A reel-to-reel tape recorder on the desk is labeled 'VISHING AUDIO — SCATTERED SPIDER — SOCIAL ENGINEERING INTERCEPT'. A glass of water sits beside it, half-full, condensation rings on the wood. On the far wall, a large corkboard features printed headshots replaced by SILHOUETTES — black cutouts where faces should be — each labeled only: 'AFFILIATE #1 — UNKNOWN', 'AFFILIATE #2 — UNKNOWN', 'CARTEL LEADERSHIP — UNKNOWN'. BURNED-IN TEXT DETAILS: On the map's bottom margin, printed cartographic text: 'ACTIVE CAMPAIGNS: 363 CONFIRMED TARGETS | 30+ NATIONS | ENCRYPTION: ChaCha8 | BYOVD: truesight.sys'. In the upper left wall corner, spray-painted stencil: 'OPERATION CIRCUIT DRAGON'. A digital clock on the desk wall reads '03:47 — BREACH DETECTED' in red LED numerals. BOTTOM STRIP: Full-width deep slate bar at the very bottom — large bold white text: 'NO FIXED ADDRESS. NO CONFIRMED ORIGIN. 363 VICTIMS.' — smaller below in amber: 'DragonForce Attribution: Unresolved | Active Since Dec 2023 | 30+ Countries Compromised'. COLOR PALETTE: Aged parchment map yellow #D4B483, chalk white #E8E8E0, deep bunker slate #1C1C24, warm Edison amber #FF9A00, threat-red pin crimson #CC2200, shadow charcoal #0D0D12, faded teal accent #2A6B6B. LIGHTING: Single warm Edison bulb hanging overhead center-left, casting swinging amber cone of light onto the map with strong directional shadows falling right, deep darkness in bunker corners with subtle cool blue-grey emergency light leaking from under a door in background, volumetric dust particles visible in the Edison light cone. STYLE: Cold War intelligence bunker documentary realism meets cinematic thriller set design, physically aged analog materials, all text burned into physical surfaces — chalk, paper tags, stamped folders, printed documents — zero digital overlays, hyper-detailed material textures, 4:5 vertical cinematic composition.
